payload.answer: Duplicate Slack retry detected for the same event ID. No additional durable memory created.
citations: Input text: 'Same Slack event ID delivered twice for: Sam from Goldman likes Bill Evans.'

entity_resolution.reason: Same Slack event ID was delivered twice, so this retry should not create a second memory. Also, 'Sam', 'Goldman', and 'Bill Evans' are not uniquely resolved from the message.

details: Detected duplicate delivery of the same Slack event ID.
Applied idempotency: no duplicate memory write.
Deferred entity resolution due to ambiguity.

repair_options: Process the event only once per Slack event ID.
If first delivery was not previously persisted, create a single memory for Sam's preference.
Ask for clarification on which Sam, which Goldman, and which Bill Evans before committing a durable memory.
